scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,landing,portal -c cyan,green,yellow "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:landing" "npm run dev:portal"
scripts.build:landing: cd frontend-landing && npm i && npm run build
scripts.build:portal: cd frontend-portal && npm i && npm run build
scripts.build: rm -rf .vercel/output && mkdir -p .vercel/output/static/portal && npm run build:landing && npm run build:portal && cp -a frontend-landing/dist/. .vercel/output/static/ && cp -a frontend-portal/dist/. .vercel/output/static/portal/
